title: Corporate information - Canada.ca
content:
## About Immigration, Refugees, and Citizenship Canada
We develop programs that help immigrants and refugees:
- settle into their new life here
- become citizens if they’re permanent residents
We also issue travel documents (like passports) to Canadians.
- Access to information and privacy
- Proactive disclosure
- Anti-Racism Strategy 2.0

## Services and information
Explore the mandate of Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada

### The
          Deputy Ministers
Meet the Deputy Minister and Associate Deputy Minister for the department

See how we’re committed to building a skilled and diverse workforce that reflects the Canadians we

### Passport
          program
Responsible for issuing, refusing to issue, revoking, withholding and recovering Canadian passports

          instructions on their use
